description: Report-only contract fixtures for Roadmaps K, N, S, and T. These make platform capability, tenant safety, fleet scale, and DFIR/analyst UX gates machine-checkable before VM or backend execution exists.
claim_boundary: Contract fixtures only. They validate expected evidence shape and classified gaps; they do not prove live endpoint collection, backend enforcement, scale, SIEM delivery, or DFIR collection.

fixtures.expected_artifact: fim baseline and change artifact with path, registry key, sha256, owner, baseline id, and change type
fixtures.remaining_gap: No executed file/registry baseline or realtime change evidence exists yet.

fixtures.expected_artifact: inventory artifact with hardware, software, packages, processes, CPE, and CVE mapping where available
fixtures.remaining_gap: Inventory shape is declared but not normalized into server-side freshness and vulnerability fields.

fixtures.expected_artifact: per-control evidence with control id, host evidence id, status, exception, and timestamp
fixtures.remaining_gap: Compliance scores must remain unclaimed until per-control evidence replaces synthetic status.

fixtures.expected_artifact: SIEM delivery artifact with destination, schema, cursor, retry count, delivery status, and acknowledgement id
fixtures.remaining_gap: No Splunk/Sentinel/syslog delivery acknowledgement or replay cursor proof exists yet.

fixtures.expected_artifact: RBAC matrix showing allow/deny for alert read, response action, policy edit, export, and admin operations
fixtures.remaining_gap: Dry-run declares the matrix but no API test proves destructive response denial or approval requirements.

fixtures.expected_artifact: API boundary artifact proving cross-tenant agent, event, alert, response, export, and audit access is denied
fixtures.remaining_gap: No executed cross-tenant read/write denial artifact exists.

fixtures.expected_artifact: token scope artifact for valid least-privilege, expired, revoked, over-scoped, and wrong-tenant credentials
fixtures.remaining_gap: Token scope states are not yet covered by a backend or CLI auth fixture.

fixtures.expected_artifact: audit record with actor, tenant, target, action, decision, reason, correlation id, and immutable storage proof
fixtures.remaining_gap: Audit creation on denied actions and audit immutability are not yet proven.

fixtures.expected_artifact: multi-agent artifact with stable agent ids, duplicate hostname policy, and enrollment ids
fixtures.remaining_gap: No three-agent run exists to prove identity stability or duplicate hostname behavior.

fixtures.expected_artifact: isolation artifact showing events and alerts remain scoped to the originating agent and tenant
fixtures.remaining_gap: No simultaneous run proves absence of cross-agent evidence contamination.

fixtures.expected_artifact: offline/reconnect artifact with heartbeat gap, queued events, dropped events, and catch-up duration
fixtures.remaining_gap: Offline and reconnect behavior is not measured under fleet conditions.

fixtures.expected_artifact: load artifact with ingest latency, alert latency, queue depth, event loss, and API query latency
fixtures.remaining_gap: No simultaneous benign/deterministic workload metrics exist.

fixtures.expected_artifact: catalog artifact for process tree, autoruns, services, scheduled tasks, persistence keys, event logs, PowerShell history, network connections, prefetch/amcache, and selected files
fixtures.remaining_gap: Artifact catalog exists only as a contract; no endpoint collection proof exists.

fixtures.expected_artifact: hunt manifest with per-agent success, errors, duration, bytes collected, and artifact counts
fixtures.remaining_gap: No multi-agent hunt execution artifact exists.

fixtures.expected_artifact: triage package manifest with hashes, timestamps, host identity, query/profile version, redaction, and chain of custody
fixtures.remaining_gap: No package export, manifest hash, or redaction proof exists.

fixtures.expected_artifact: analyst UX artifact with searchable results, saved query, timeline/notebook summary, and exportable report
fixtures.remaining_gap: No analyst review surface proof is linked to a DFIR hunt id.
